cluster.title: Build, CI/CD, Deploy & Website
cluster.summary: Repo scaffolding: 15 GitHub Actions workflows (per-component CI, signed GHCR image releases, tenant deploy pipeline, desktop release, restore drill, Pages deploy), multi-tenant deploy scripts and registry, self-host compose + installer, local dev stack (Makefile/docker-compose), five AST policy-lint tools, and the Astro marketing site. Strong supply-chain design (SHA-pinned actions, cosign+attestation+Trivy, digest-pinned promotion) undermined by unexercised safety paths: a broken branch-protection applier, a staged-rollout gate that always fails, drifted CI path filters, and large JS test suites that no CI runs.

nodes.summary: Path-filtered per-component CI: pytest/pip-audit/SBOM per Python service, typecheck+build for frontend, typecheck+vitest for desktop, 3-OS CLI checks, repo-wide pre-commit + gitleaks + tenants lint.

Main-branch 4-image matrix: build/push to GHCR, cosign keyless sign, provenance attestation, Trivy CRITICAL gate, then assemble deployment-manifest.json (v2) referencing image digests + SBOM artifact IDs.

Parameterized per-tenant promotion inside GitHub Environments: verify release (cosign/attestation/residency), staged-rollout gate, OIDC federation, orchestrator invocation, audit POST; deploy-staging/deploy-production are thin wrappers.
Six untested Python CLIs backing deploy.yml: validate_tenants, load_tenant, verify_release, check_staged_rollout, invoke_orchestrator (argo/helm/flux), post_audit.
Authoritative (currently empty) tenant registry + JSON-schema contract; validated in ci-repo and again inside deploy.yml; enforces tenant-<id> GitHub Environment naming.

Ruleset source-of-truth plus apply-branch-protection.yml applier; the applier's inline Python has a top-level `return` SyntaxError so it can never run, and the required checks would deadlock path-filtered PRs if applied.

C12 weekly + migration-PR drill: clean postgres:16, yoyo-apply both services' migrations, load tests/fixtures/postgres-restore/seed.sql, run each service's restore_smoke.py against manifest.yaml expected counts.

v* tag → 3-leg native matrix (mac arm64/x64, win x64): desktop bundle build, runtime staging via desktop-distribution's stage.mjs, secret-gated signing/notarization, electron-builder publish + updater feeds.

Single-node production stack: idempotent install.sh generates .env secrets once, pulls 4 GHCR images, boots postgres 17 + one-shot migrate jobs + backend/ai-backend(+worker)/facade/frontend behind an nginx gateway (single_user_desktop profile).

Local dev: make setup/dev runs the 3 services + Vite with dev-IdP secrets; docker-dev variant behind infra/docker/dev-gateway.conf nginx on :8080 (still uses legacy DEV_AUTH_BYPASS); make prod builds all images after secret checks.

Five AST guards: A10 route-scope coverage (imports both FastAPI apps), C2 migration-manifest checksums (not wired into CI despite docs), C3 audit-in-transaction, C10 @reader no-write-SQL, TU-1 forbid direct LLM SDK imports; own pytest suites run by nothing.

npm workspace root, tsconfig.base, pyrightconfig (stale 3.11 pin), .pre-commit-config (ruff/prettier/pygrep + 4 local policy hooks), dependabot (actions/pip/npm/docker with reasoned ignores), CODEOWNERS.

3-page Astro marketing site (index/token/docs, ~2.6k LOC) with Playwright capture tooling and a serve-and-fetch link checker; deploy-website.yml publishes dist/ to the org GitHub Pages repo via deploy key (only unpinned-action workflow).
Grafana C11 dashboard: top-N slowest/hottest DB statement digests from prometheus db_statement_* metrics.

edges.label: ci-backend: hash-verified install, full pytest, A10 route-scope check, SBOM
ci-ai-backend: full services/ai-backend pytest + pip-audit + SBOM (no hash pinning)
ci-backend-facade: hash-verified install + pytest + SBOM
ci-frontend: typecheck + vite build (runs no vitest suites; filter misses chat-surface/chat-transport)
ci-desktop: typecheck + ~830-test vitest suite, filter covers all imported workspace packages
ci-cli: 3-OS syntax check, smoke, npm-pack manifest validation of tools/cli
check_route_scopes imports runtime_api.app:RuntimeApiAppFactory.create_app to enumerate routes
check_route_scopes imports backend_app.app:create_app; check_audit_in_transaction AST-scans service.py
check_reader_methods scans services/ai-backend/src for write SQL in @reader methods; MANIFEST.lock format shared with both migrate.py implementations
push signed digest-pinned images to GHCR; resolve SBOM artifact IDs via gh api; upload deployment-manifest
cosign keyless OIDC signing of every image digest
builds services/backend/Dockerfile (+facade, ai-backend, frontend Dockerfiles) from repo context
runs validate_tenants, load_tenant, verify_release, check_staged_rollout, invoke_orchestrator, post_audit
OIDC federation into tenant cloud via configure-aws-credentials
orchestrator dispatch: argo REST PATCH+sync+poll, helm upgrade --atomic, flux reconcile
post_audit.py POSTs deploy audit event to /internal/v1/audit/deploy with x-enterprise-service-token
tenant entry + tenant-<id>-<env> GitHub Environment naming resolved from tenants.yml
postgres:16 service container; yoyo-applies both services' migrations then seeds and counts
applies services/ai-backend/migrations and runs its scripts/restore_smoke.py (same for backend)
npm run build --workspace @0x-copilot/desktop then electron-builder per-arch installers
runs tools/desktop-runtime/stage.mjs to stage python+postgres+services for the target arch
notarytool notarization via App Store Connect API key (secret-gated)
pulls the 4 published GHCR images (IMAGE_TAG pinnable to a commit sha)
boots backend desktop_app composition root + migrate job + facade + ai-backend API/worker + SPA behind nginx
postgres:17 with atlas_backend + atlas_ai logical DBs; LISTEN/NOTIFY event bus for API/worker split
optional local models: RUNTIME_ENABLE_LOCAL_MODELS + OLLAMA_BASE_URL passthrough
make dev launches backend/ai-backend/facade uvicorn processes + Vite with shared dev secrets env contract
docker-dev still sets legacy DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=true + FACADE_DEV_ORG_ID/USER_ID for the facade
provider key passthrough (OPENAI/ANTHROPIC/GOOGLE_API_KEY) required by check-provider-key
deploy-website publishes dist/ to 0x-copilot-dev.github.io via deploy key (unpinned peaceiris action)
dependabot weekly update lanes for actions/pip(x3)/npm/docker(x4) with reviewer teams
gh api rulesets diff/apply (currently unreachable: inline Python SyntaxError)
CI pip-installs packages/service-contracts + packages/audit-chain into each service env
contract documented in docs/ci-cd/multi-tenant-deploy.md; runbooks referenced from workflow comments
